message:
Fix pnpm installation order in CI for macOS

Install pnpm via corepack before the setup-node action attempts to use
it for caching. This fixes the CI failure on macOS where pnpm was not
available when setup-node tried to cache dependencies.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -82,14 +82,14 @@ jobs:
         with:
           name: failures-${{runner.os}}
           path: ${{steps.parse-files.outputs.failures}}
+      - name: Install pnpm
+        run: corepack enable pnpm
       - name: Set up Node.js
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
           node-version: 22
-          cache: 'pnpm'
+          cache: "pnpm"
           cache-dependency-path: pnpm-lock.yaml
-      - name: Install pnpm
-        run: corepack enable pnpm
       - name: Run Node binding tests
         shell: bash
         run: |
